UI_LSHS_Inventing_Max: o +%1 to max number of special improvements <LINE>
UI_LSHS_Inventing_10: o Average cost for discovering new items permanently decreased by 50% <LINE>
UI_LSHS_Inventing_9: o Can convert 3 improvement pieces into one of another type, except for rare pieces <LINE>
UI_LSHS_Inventing_7: o You no longer have to wait until Eureka wears off to continue inventing or researching <LINE>
UI_LSHS_Inventing_6: o Effects of mental fatigue now wear off more quickly <LINE>
UI_LSHS_Inventing_5: o Added a small chance of trigering critical events for higher level inventions (stronger versions of failure and luck events) <LINE> o Rarely during production, be greeted by a mysterious being <LINE>
UI_LSHS_Inventing_4: o Can now discover complex gadgets that can be improved trough research <LINE>
UI_LSHS_Inventing_1: Welcome to the world of tinkering and salvage! Hoard all kinds of scrap and items to create toys, costumes, random curios, clever gadgets and even complex machines. Experiment until you become a great inventor or die horribly in a freak accident. Good luck! <LINE> o Unlocked failure events <LINE>
UI_LSHS_Inventing_General: o New inventions can be discovered <LINE> o Work speed increased <LINE>
UI_PlaylistText2: Previous music selection will be replaced
UI_WardrobeText: Replace the configuration for this outfit
UI_trait_WeakStomachDesc:
Higher chance to have food illness.

Weaker Bladder, can barely hold it and has to use the bathroom more often.
UI_trait_IronGutDesc:
Less chance to have food illness.

Stronger Bladder, can hold for longer and needs the bathroom less often.
UI_trait_outdoorsmandesc:
Not affected by harsh weather conditions.

Smaller mood penalty when relieving bladder outdoors.
UI_trait_artisticdesc: Naturally gifted artists, they strongly benefit from Art related hobbies, they can also make for pretty good writers.
UI_trait_couchpotatodesc:
They prefer to stay home and indulge in comfort.

Gets tired faster and sleeps more often.
Enjoys passive entertainment.
Slower boredom buildup while indoors.
Hates Meditation and being outside.
UI_trait_disciplineddesc:
Diligent and focused, constantly striving to improve themselves, they make for excellent Martial Artists and Meditation masters.

Not very interested in passive entertainment.
Comfort need - reduced rate and positive/negative effects.
UI_trait_virtuosodesc: Musicians at heart, with a natural talent for playing and composing Music, they also make for very charismatic performers.
UI_trait_tonedeafdesc: Not gifted with a good ear for Music and can't stand this kind of entertainment, they much prefer peace and quiet.
UI_trait_partyanimaldesc: The life of the party and talented Dancers, always ready to hit the dance floor and keep the energy high.
UI_trait_killjoydesc: Large crowds, loud music, and frenetic energy are not your cup of tea.
UI_trait_cleanfreakdesc:
They find solace in cleanliness and feel a compulsive need to live in a spotless environment.

Almost no tolerance for dirty environments.
Cleaning takes longer to perform.
UI_trait_sloppydesc:
Tidiness isn't their priority.

Higher tolerance for dirty environments.
Hates Cleaning and takes longer to perform it.
Almost never flushes the toilet on their own.
Clogs the toilet more often.
Higher chance to generate blood/dirt when bloody/dirty and trash when crafting.
UI_trait_tidydesc:
Keeping their living space clean comes easy to them.

Less chance to generate blood/dirt when bloody/dirty and trash when crafting.
Enjoys Cleaning and the action is done faster.
